description_long: This is a large, multi-story residential house with a predominantly white exterior and modern architectural features. The structure includes several balconies, terraces, and a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, green lawn, and outdoor seating areas. The windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, and the house features multiple entryways, some with small porches and decorative planters. The rooftop areas are partially accessible and include garden spaces and seating. The property is enclosed by a low fence, and the landscaping includes trees, shrubs, and flower beds. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with flat roof sections and a focus on outdoor living spaces.
description: A large, modern multi-story house with white walls, flat roofs, balconies, and a backyard pool. Features include symmetrical windows, terraces, and landscaped outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, balconies, and a small fenced courtyard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard pool, green lawn, and multiple terraces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full backyard, swimming pool, outdoor dining area, and garden landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible rooftop garden, side entry, and additional landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, decorative planters, and a simple modern door.
